title: sporobolus aeneus var. eximius
intro: Sporobolus aeneus var. eximius, also known as the exceptional or fine-leaved dropseed, is a variety of grass native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sporobolus aeneus var. eximius include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as supporting respiratory and digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
